subtitleNullable: Multi-Sensor Data for Deep Learning-Based UAV Path Planning
descriptionNullable:
Description:
The UAV Autonomous Navigation and Obstacle Avoidance Sensor Dataset is designed for research in deep learning-based autonomous flight and obstacle detection. This dataset integrates multi-sensor data, including GPS, LiDAR, IMU, and UAV telemetry, to enable real-time path planning and obstacle avoidance. It is suitable for training and evaluating deep learning models such as YOLOv5 for object detection and optimization algorithms for UAV trajectory planning.

Key Features:
Multi-Sensor Data: Includes RGB camera, LiDAR, IMU (accelerometer & gyroscope), GPS, speed, wind speed, and battery levels.
Obstacle Detection: Ground truth labels (obstacle_detected) for training deep learning models.
Real-World & Synthetic Data: Supports both real-world UAV flights and simulated environments (Gazebo, AirSim).
Diverse Flight Conditions: Covers urban, forest, industrial, and mountainous terrains with different weather conditions.
